baseline.name: single-condition industrial defect detection baseline
baseline.description: Evaluate one fixed condition without the proposed diagnostic comparison.

problem_method_insight: industrial defect detection should be evaluated by separating data quality from system behavior.
falsifiable_hypothesis: The proposed comparison improves defect recall by at least 0.05 over the baseline; a smaller gain falsifies the hypothesis.

minimum_key_experiment.name: minimum industrial defect detection comparison
minimum_key_experiment.success_threshold: proposed defect recall - baseline defect recall >= 0.05

stop_conditions: The evaluation set has fewer than 30 independent examples
